title: 2021 Employee of the Year – Clarissa Eide and Kendra Takak
summary: Employee of the Year is selected out of the outstanding employees who were selected as Employee of the Quarter throughout the year. title: 2021 Matthew Iya – Celeste Menadelook
summary: Each year Kawerak employees have the opportunity to nominate a fellow employee who helps make Kawerak a great place to work. This award is in memory of the late Matthew Iya, who was our Eskimo Walrus Commission & Housing Improvement Director in the 1980’s and early 1990’s. Matthew was a very hard worker, professional, and kind. He accomplished a lot, always had a great attitude and a smile on his face. He brought a sense of fun and camaraderie to the workplace, he was a creative thinker, who thought of our people first, he went the extra mile to reach the goals, and to make sure services were improved. Matthew is missed by ma...
